natural_language: Show actor names who appeared in action films
generated_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.actor_id, a.first_name, a.last_name FROM actor a JOIN film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id JOIN film_category fc ON fa.film_id = fc.film_id JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Action'
expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT a.first_name, a.last_name FROM actor a JOIN film_actor fa ON a.actor_id = fa.actor_id JOIN film_category fc ON fa.film_id = fc.film_id JOIN category c ON fc.category_id = c.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Action'

natural_language: Get rental count per customer with their full name
generated_sql: SELECT c.customer_id, c.first_name, c.last_name, c.email, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rental_count FROM customer c JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id
expected_sql: SELECT c.first_name, c.last_name, COUNT(r.rental_id) AS rental_count FROM customer c JOIN rental r ON c.customer_id = r.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id

natural_language: Show the title and rental rate of PG-rated films
generated_sql: SELECT title FROM film WHERE rating = 'PG'
expected_sql: SELECT title, rental_rate FROM film WHERE rating = 'PG'
